---
title: "Agentic Engineering"
description: "Build Software with AI at the Speed of Thought"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-block}
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
<div style="min-height: 150px;">
### Guide: Template
Subtitle for Guide
</div>

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3 .h-100}
![File Preview](){.border .rounded .mb-3}

<div class="mt-auto">
<!-- [Download File](../files/Excel_Grundlagen.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"} -->
</div>
:::
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
<div style="min-height: 150px;">
### Technical Setup
Subtitle for technical Setup
</div>

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3 .h-100}
![File Preview](){.border .rounded .mb-3}
    
<div class="mt-auto">
<!-- [Download File](../files/Excel_Aufgaben.xlsx){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"} -->
</div>
:::
:::

::::

<br><br><br>

::: {.card .text-center .p-3 .mb-4 .bg-light}
**Example Project**
<div class="mt-2 d-flex gap-2">
  [View on GitHub <i class="bi bi-github"></i>](){.btn .btn-dark .px-4 role="button" target="_blank"}
  [Open Website <i class="bi bi-globe"></i>](https://haydenkg.github.io/stads-vibe-coding-workshop/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .px-4 role="button" target="_blank"}
</div>

:::
:::
